current.headline: Deschamps and Southgate Prepare for Bronze Medal Battle in Dallas
current.summary: France and England prepare to contest the World Cup Third Place Play-off in Dallas. Both managers face selection decisions as they search for a positive end to their campaigns.

items.headline: Mbappé Fit and Chasing World Cup Golden Boot in Play-off
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé is expected to start for France against England as he looks to secure the tournament's top scorer award and the Golden Boot.

items.headline: Bellingham and Kane Vow to Finish World Cup on High Note
items.summary: Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane speaking ahead of England's Third Place Play-off against France, outlining their determination to win the bronze medal.
